title: Inline Codes Checker
description: Compare source and target for inline code differences. Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

codeDifference.title: Warn if there is a code difference between source and target segments
codeDifference.description: Verify target has the same inline codes as source.

guessOpenClose.title: Try to guess opening/closing types for placeholder codes
guessOpenClose.description: Guess which inline codes are opening and closing pairs.

extraCodesAllowed.title: Codes allowed to be extra in the target
extraCodesAllowed.description: Number of extra inline codes allowed in target beyond source.

missingCodesAllowed.title: Codes allowed to be missing from the target
missingCodesAllowed.description: Number of source inline codes allowed to be missing from target.

typesToIgnore.title: List of the inline code types to ignore
typesToIgnore.description: Semicolon-separated list of inline code types to exclude from checking.
